entries.morph: let = 让；loose = 松的、不受约束的。合起来就是“让某人/某物自由”。
entries.example: 搭配：let loose after the exam; let the dog loose; let loose your imagination。例句：After the exam, we finally let loose. 考试后，我们终于放松了一下。六级重点：口语常见 Let loose! = 放开点，别拘束。

entries.morph: clear = 清楚的；clarity = 清晰、明确。
entries.example: 搭配：lack clarity; with clarity; mental clarity; visual clarity。例句：The essay lacks clarity. 这篇文章不够清楚。六级重点：bring clarity to sth. = 使某事更清楚。

entries.meaning: n. / v. / suffix；病房；病区；避开；-wards 表示“朝……方向”。
entries.morph: ward 有“看护、保护”感；-wards 表方向。
entries.example: 搭配：hospital ward; ward off disease; forwards; backwards; towards。例句：This medicine wards off infection. 这种药能预防感染。六级重点：ward off = 避开；防止；抵挡。

entries.meaning: adj.；独特的；有特色的；有辨识度的。
entries.morph: distinct = 明显不同的；-ive = 形容词后缀。
entries.example: 搭配：distinctive feature; distinctive style; distinctive culture; distinctive voice。例句：She has a distinctive voice. 她的声音很有辨识度。六级重点：distinctive feature = 独特特征。

entries.meaning: adj. / v-ing；抑制的；阻碍的；正在阻止的。
entries.morph: inhibit = 抑制、阻止；-ing = 起……作用的 / 正在……。
entries.example: 搭配：inhibiting factor; inhibit growth; inhibit development; inhibit creativity。例句：Fear is inhibiting his creativity. 恐惧正在抑制他的创造力。六级重点：inhibiting factor = 阻碍因素。

entries.morph: majesty = 威严、庄严；-ic = 形容词后缀。
entries.example: 搭配：majestic mountains; majestic scenery; majestic palace; majestic appearance。例句：The mountain looks majestic at sunrise. 这座山在日出时显得很雄伟。六级重点：比 grand 更强调“威严、令人敬畏”。

entries.morph: interrogate = 审问；rog/rogat = ask；-ion = 名词。
entries.example: 搭配：police interrogation; under interrogation; interrogation room; intense interrogation。例句：The interrogation lasted for two hours. 审问持续了两个小时。六级重点：常用于警察、军队、调查语境。

entries.meaning: adj.；强制性的；法定的；必须做的。
entries.morph: mandate = 命令、授权、强制要求；-ory = 形容词后缀。
entries.example: 搭配：mandatory course; mandatory training; mandatory requirement; mandatory rule。例句：Attendance is mandatory. 出勤是强制要求的。六级重点：mandatory course = 必修课；optional course = 选修课。

entries.meaning: adv.；本质上；内在地；从根本上说。
entries.morph: intrinsic = 内在的、本质的；-ally = 副词后缀。
entries.example: 搭配：intrinsically valuable; intrinsically linked; intrinsically different; intrinsically motivated。例句：The work is intrinsically valuable. 这项工作本身就有价值。六级重点：强调“事物内部本身”，近义词 essentially, inherently。

entries.morph: e-/ex- = out；vad/vade = go。evade = 走出去避开。
entries.example: 搭配：evade responsibility; evade taxes; evade capture; evade the question; evade detection。例句：He tried to evade responsibility. 他试图逃避责任。六级重点：evade 常带“故意躲开”的意思。

entries.morph: inter- = between；ven/vent = come。intervene = 走到中间来。
entries.example: 搭配：intervene in a conflict; intervene in the market; government intervention; military intervention。例句：The government had to intervene in the crisis. 政府不得不介入这场危机。六级重点：结构 intervene in sth.，一般不直接接宾语。

entries.morph: pre- = before；ced/ceed = go；-ent = 名词/形容词后缀。
entries.example: 搭配：set a precedent; follow a precedent; without precedent; legal precedent; historical precedent。例句：This case sets a precedent. 这个案例开创了先例。六级重点：易混 precedent 先例；president 总统；precedence 优先权。

entries.morph: ap- = toward；point = 点、指向。appoint = 指定到某位置/时间点。
entries.example: 搭配：appoint sb. as manager; appoint sb. to a position; make an appointment。例句：They appointed him as manager. 他们任命他为经理。六级重点：appointment = 预约；任命。make an appointment = 预约。

entries.meaning: adj.；有义务的；不得不的；感激的。
entries.morph: oblige = 迫使、使有义务；-ed = 被动/形容词后缀。
entries.example: 搭配：be obliged to do sth.; feel obliged to do sth.; much obliged; obligation。例句：We are obliged to follow the rules. 我们必须遵守规则。六级重点：be obliged to do sth. = 有义务/不得不做某事。

entries.meaning: adj.；有争议的；容易引起争论的。
entries.morph: contend = 争论、竞争、主张；-ious = 形容词后缀。
entries.example: 搭配：contentious issue; contentious topic; contentious debate; highly contentious。例句：This is a contentious issue. 这是一个有争议的问题。六级重点：比 debatable 更强，强调容易引发分歧。

entries.morph: dis- = away；pose = put；-al = 名词后缀。dispose = 处理、安排、丢弃。
entries.example: 搭配：waste disposal; garbage disposal; sewage disposal; at one’s disposal。例句：We have limited resources at our disposal. 我们可支配的资源有限。六级重点：waste disposal = 废物处理；at one’s disposal = 供某人使用。

entries.meaning: n.；网格；格子；电网；系统网络。
entries.morph: grid 可理解为“横线+竖线组成的一格一格的系统”。
entries.example: 搭配：grid line; grid paper; grid pattern; grid layout; power grid。例句：The storm damaged the power grid. 暴风雨破坏了电网。六级重点：power grid = 电网；grid layout = 网格布局。

entries.morph: infra- = below/under，基础、下层；structure = 结构。
entries.example: 搭配：public infrastructure; transport infrastructure; digital infrastructure; infrastructure investment。例句：The city needs better infrastructure. 这座城市需要更好的基础设施。六级重点：注意拼写 infrastructure，infra- 后接 structure，不要漏字母。

entries.morph: ad- = to；her/hes = stick，黏住；-ence = 名词后缀。
entries.example: 搭配：adherence to rules; adherence to principles; adherence to standards; strict adherence。例句：Adherence to safety standards is necessary. 遵守安全标准是必要的。六级重点：adherence to sth. = 对某事的遵守/坚持。

entries.meaning: adj.；独有的；专属的；排外的；高档的；不包括的。
entries.morph: ex- = out；clus/clud = close；-ive = 形容词后缀。
entries.example: 搭配：exclusive rights; exclusive access; exclusive interview; exclusive offer; exclusive of tax。例句：This offer is exclusive to members. 这个优惠仅会员专享。六级重点：exclusive of tax = 不含税；inclusive of tax = 含税。

entries.morph: over- = 过度、超过；whelm = 覆盖、淹没。
entries.example: 搭配：feel overwhelmed; be overwhelmed by pressure; overwhelming evidence; overwhelm the enemy。例句：I was overwhelmed by the amount of work. 工作量太大，我感到不知所措。六级重点：overwhelmed = 压力很大/不知所措；overwhelming = 压倒性的。
